name: Incident Response Pipeline
description: Classifies and summarizes infrastructure incidents using resilient multi-provider LLM routing

parameters.userPrompt:
Classify this incident into exactly one severity: critical, major, minor.

Incident report:
{{inputs.report}}

Respond with ONLY the severity word, nothing else.

agents.systemPrompt: You are an incident severity classifier. Respond with exactly one word: critical, major, or minor.
You are a senior SRE writing incident summaries for the on-call team. Be precise, actionable, and concise.
